title: Ninjago Breeze
description: Turns the breeze into the Ninja from Ninjago, and changes related features as well.
body:
This pack replaces the breeze with the Ninja from Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu (Requires Optifine or Entity Texture Features + Entity Model Features). It also retextures all breeze-related items into Ninjago-based equivalents, and affects the lang files in all non-joke variants of English. (I had to take creative liberties with some features).

Feel free to rearrange, delete, or modify the files in this pack however you want, as long as you don't publicly release any of my files.

Changes include:
- Breeze -> Ninja (with more than 80 variants based on all 6 Ninja and a few other characters)
- Breeze rod -> "Spinjitzu Staff"
- Wind charge -> "Spin Charge" (begrudgingly inspired by Arin's object spinjitzu in Dragons Rising)
- Potions of Wind Charging -> Potions of "Spin Charging"
- Heavy core -> same thing but gold
- Mace -> "Mace of Wind" (meant to be like a Golden Weapon)
- Wind Burst enchantment -> Air-Jitzu enchantment
- Flow armor trim -> Zen Xtreme armor trim (based on the Ninja's ZX suits from seasons 1 and 2)
- Flow pot sherd / banner pattern -> "Cyclone" sherd/pattern
- Guster pot sherd / banner pattern -> "Shinobi" sherd/pattern


Ninja skins can also be worn as player skins with no modifications necessary. Sensei Wu's hat and Morro's transparency will not appear, though.
